## Type of Change

## Checklist

- [ ] `cargo fmt --all` passes
- [ ] `cargo clippy --all-targets` is clean
- [ ] `cargo test --all` passes
- [ ] New public types/functions have doc comments
- [ ] If frontend changed: `npm run type-check` and `npm run build` pass
